---
id: search-for-key

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Search for keys"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v2/projects/{projectId}/keys/search"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This endpoint helps you to find desired key by keyName, base translation or translation in specified language.

Sort is ignored for this request.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
